sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: FedEx FY26 Q3 매출 240억 달러 달성, 연간 이익 전망 상향 및 Freight 분사 6월 예정

keyPoints.text: FY26 3분기 매출은 240억 달러로 전년 동기 222억 달러 대비 성장했으며, 조정 영업이익 역시 16억 2,000만 달러로 개선됐다. 미국 내 패키지 물량 증가와 수익률 강세가 실적을 이끌었다.
Non-GAAP EPS는 5.25달러로 전년 4.51달러 대비 상승했으며, GAAP EPS는 4.41달러(전년 3.76달러)였다. 해외 세금 손실 이월 인식으로 9,900만 달러(주당 0.41달러) 세제 혜택이 포함됐다.
FY26 연간 이익 전망을 상향 조정했으며, FedEx Freight 분사는 2026년 6월 1일 예정대로 진행 중이다.

riskChanges.text: 글로벌 무역 정책 변화에 따른 재무적 영향, MD-11 기재 운항 중단, 구매 운송비 상승이 Federal Express 세그먼트 이익에 부분적 부담을 주고 있다.

businessChanges.text: Federal Express 세그먼트는 미국 내 패키지 물량 증가와 국제 Priority 수익률 상승으로 실적이 개선됐다. 반면 FedEx Freight 세그먼트는 분사 준비 비용, 물량 감소, 임금 인상으로 이익이 감소했다.
FedEx Freight는 37억 달러 규모의 선순위 채권을 발행 완료했으며, 해당 순 발행 대금을 분사 전 FedEx Corporation에 배분할 예정이다.

financialHighlights.text: FY26 Q3 매출 240억 달러(GAAP/조정 동일), 전년 동기 222억 달러 대비 증가.
조정(non-GAAP) 영업이익 16억 2,000만 달러(전년 15억 1,000만 달러), GAAP 영업이익 13억 5,000만 달러(전년 12억 9,000만 달러).
해외 세금 손실 이월 인식으로 순이익에 9,900만 달러(주당 0.41달러) 세제 혜택이 반영됐다.

watchItems.text: Freight 분사(6월 1일 예정) 완료 후 잔존 FedEx 구조의 수익성 및 자유현금흐름 변화 추이가 다음 실적 발표의 핵심 관전 포인트다.
글로벌 무역 정책 불확실성과 MD-11 기재 운항 제한이 다음 분기 Federal Express 세그먼트 마진에 미치는 영향을 확인해야 한다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 fdx-earningsreleasefy2026q3.htm EX-99.1 Document FedEx Reports Strong Third Quarter Results Raises Full-year Fiscal 2026 Earnings Outlook On Track to Spin Off FedEx Freight on June 1, 2026 MEMPHIS, Tenn., March 19, 2026 ... FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) today reported the following consolidated results for the third quarter ended February 28 (adjusted measures exclude the items listed below): Fiscal 2026 Fiscal 2025 As Reported (GAAP) Adjusted (non-GAAP) As Reported (GAAP) Adjusted (non-GAAP) Revenue $24.0 billion $24.0 billion $22.2 billion $22.2 billion Operating income $1.35  Normalized numeric aliases: $24.0 billion = 240억 달러; $22.2 billion = 222억 달러; $1.35 billion = 13억 5,000만 달러; $1.62 billion = 16억 2,000만 달러; $1.29 billion = 12억 9,000만 달러; $1.51 billion = 15억 1,000만 달러; $1.06 billion = 10억 6,000만 달러; $1.26 billion = 12억 6,000만 달러; $1.09 billion = 10억 9,000만 달러; $1.29 = 1.29달러; $1.09 = 1.09달러; $0.91 = 0.91달러; $4.41 = 4.41달러; $5.25 = 5.25달러; $3.76 = 3.76달러; $4.51 = 4.51달러.

2025 FedEx Freight spin-off costs $0.61 $0.07 Business optimization costs 0.21 0.56 Fiscal year change costs 0.02 — International regulatory and legacy FedEx Ground legal matters — 0.12 Consolidated operating income improved in the third quarter, reflecting strength in U.S. domestic and International Priority package yields, continued cost savings from transformation initiatives, and increased U.S. domestic package volume. Net income includes a tax benefit of $99 million ($0.41 per diluted share) from the recognition of certain foreign tax loss carryforwards. “Team FedEx delivered another quarter of strong financial results and excellent service for our customers, powered by disciplined operational execution, the resilience of our global network, and the accelerating impact of our advanced digital solutions,” said Raj Subramaniam, FedEx Corp. president and chief executive  Normalized numeric aliases: $99 million = 9,900만 달러; $0.61 = 0.61달러; $0.07 = 0.07달러; $99 = 99달러; $0.41 = 0.41달러.

“We are the industrial network that powers the global economy, and our network and digital transformation is enabling us to make supply chains smarter for everyone. Our strategy not only strengthens our operations but also - more - 1 drives robust free cash flow, positioning FedEx to deliver durable, long-term value for stockholders.” Federal Express segment operating results improved during the quarter, driven by higher U.S. domestic and International Priority package yields, continued cost savings from transformation initiatives, and increased U.S. domestic package volume. These factors were partially offset by higher variable incentive compensation expenses and wage rates, the financial impacts of global trade policy changes, increased purchased transportation rates, and the MD-11 groundings. FedEx Freight segment operating results decreased during the quarter due to increased costs

with the company's planned spin-off, lower shipments, and higher wage rates, partially offset by increased yield. FedEx Freight Separation On Track The planned spin-off of FedEx Freight into a new publicly traded company is on track for June 1, 2026. On February 5, 2026, FedEx Freight completed the issuance of $3.7 billion of senior notes. FedEx Freight intends to distribute the net proceeds from the offering of the notes to FedEx Corporation as part of the consideration for FedEx Corporation’s contribution of assets to FedEx Freight in connection with the spin-off. FedEx Freight will host an Investor Day in New York City on April 8, 2026. InPost Offer On February 9, 2026, FedEx announced that, together with Advent International, A&R Investments, and PPF Group, it reached a conditional agreement on a recommended all-cash offer to take InPost private at €15.60 per share. The  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.7 billion = 37억 달러; $3.7 = 3.7달러.
